name: Willatook

timeline.title: COD estimate updated
timeline.detail: COD changed from 2027-08 to 2027-08-01 (source: AEMO Generation Information)

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: ENGIE public target: FID in 2027, build by 2029 — one of the more publicly-planned T7 winners. AURES envelope 450 MW; T7 award 338 MW subset. Wind Prospect WA is developer partner.

operational_notes: ENGIE is CIS counterparty (won 338 MW T7 May 2026); Wind Prospect WA is the developer partner (same pattern as Hexham + Whyte Yarcowie). ENGIE public target: **FID in 2027, build by 2029** — one of the more publicly-planned T7 winners. AURES full project envelope 450 MW; T7 CIS award 338 MW subset.

timeline_events.title: CIS Tender 7 underwriting awarded (338 MW)
timeline_events.detail: ENGIE's Willatook Wind Farm (VIC) wins CIS Tender 7 underwriting. One of Victoria's two T7 wind winners. ENGIE is CEC signatory.

sources.title: New projects to deliver 7.8 GW of clean energy (DCCEEW)
